# DeviceActivityData.Error.missingData

**Case**

An error indicating the requested data does not exist.

## Declaration

```swift
case missingData
```

## Discussion

If fetching cached data returns this error, fetching live data may resolve the issue.

## Representing errors

- **DeviceActivityData.Error.unavailable**: An error indicating data access is unavailable.
- **DeviceActivityData.Error.unauthorized**: An error indicating the app isn’t authorized to provide parental controls and access data.
